improvements.problem: Initial implementation created a module but did not wire it into a deployable parent template.
improvements.prompt_improvement: Explicitly require creating/updating the top-level infra deployment template (e.g., infra/main.bicep) whenever acceptance criteria require runtime provisioning behavior.

improvements.problem: Initial tests used raw string matching and were brittle/non-structural.
improvements.prompt_improvement: Require infrastructure tests to validate compiled ARM JSON structure and property values rather than source text snippets.

improvements.problem: Storage account parameter validation was added only after review.
improvements.prompt_improvement: Include a checklist item to add Bicep parameter constraints (min/max length and valid naming assumptions) for Azure resource names.

improvements.problem: Tooling dependency for infra tests was implicit.
improvements.prompt_improvement: Require documenting any non-Python/non-npm test prerequisites (for example az bicep) in README whenever tests depend on external CLIs.

improvements.problem: Output contract changed unintentionally during refactor to parent syntax.
improvements.prompt_improvement: Require preserving public output contracts when refactoring templates, or explicitly documenting contract changes in the PR.
